title: West Side Rhythm (Chicago Genre - shot 6)
about:
[Verse 1]
Boots on the floor
Step on the beat
Hand on the wall
Feel that heat
Smoke in the room
Clap, clap back
You move like that
I move like that

[Pre-Chorus]
Come a little closer
Don’t think twice
One more turn
And it feels so right
Hold that groove
Don’t let go
We go up, we go up
You know, you know

[Chorus]
Move it, move it, move it
Jack that body now
Move it, move it, move it
Keep that pulse real loud
West side, west side
We don’t slow down
Move it, move it, move it
Spin it all around (move it)

[Verse 2]
Sneakers on shine
Sweat on your neck
Beat keeps crawling
Stack by stack
Bass in your chest
Clap with the crowd
Hands up high
Say it out loud

[Pre-Chorus]
Come a little closer
Don’t think twice
One more turn
And it feels so right
Hold that groove
Don’t let go
We go up, we go up
You know, you know

[Chorus]
Move it, move it, move it
Jack that body now
Move it, move it, move it
Keep that pulse real loud
West side, west side
We don’t slow down
Move it, move it, move it
Spin it all

[Bridge]
Cut to the kick
Let the room breathe
One hand up
Then set it free
Piano hits
Like a door swung wide
Then back to the floor
For the final ride

[Chorus]
Move it, move it, move it
Jack that body now

Keep that pulse real loud
